tif

Class TagTranslator

  • java.lang.Object
    • tif.TagTranslator

  • public class TagTranslator
extends java.lang.Object
    Utility class responsible for translating raw TIFF/EXIF tag values into human-readable strings.

    This class handles various data types including Windows XP UCS-2 strings, rational numbers, and enumerated constants for standard tags like Orientation, Compression, and GPS data. The output is designed to closely match the formatting of industry-standard tools like ExifTool.

    Since:
    14 May 2026
    Version:
    1.1
    Author:
    Trevor Maggs

    • Constructor Detail

      • TagTranslator

        public TagTranslator()

    • Method Detail

      • getDisplayName

        public static java.lang.String getDisplayName(DirectoryIdentifier dir,
                                              Taggable tag)
        Determines the appropriate display name for a tag based on its directory context. For example, JPEG offsets in IFD1 are traditionally labelled as Thumbnail attributes.
        Parameters:
        dir - the directory identifier where the tag resides
        tag - the tag definition
        Returns:
        a localised or descriptive string name for the tag

      • translate

        public static java.lang.String translate(Taggable tag,
                                         java.lang.Object value)
        The primary entry point for value translation. Routes values to specific handlers based on tag hints or directory-specific logic.
        Parameters:
        tag - the tag definition containing metadata hints
        value - the raw object value extracted from the image file
        Returns:
        a formatted string representation of the value

      • translateBaseline

        private static java.lang.String translateBaseline(TagIFD_Baseline tag,
                                                  java.lang.Object val)

      • translateOrientation

        private static java.lang.String translateOrientation(java.lang.Object val)
        Translates the Orientation tag (0x0112). Maps numeric values to descriptions of image rotation and mirroring.
        Parameters:
        val - the raw value as a Number
        Returns:
        a description of the orientation, for example: "Rotate 90 CW"

      • translateResolutionUnit

        private static java.lang.String translateResolutionUnit(java.lang.Object val)
        Translates the Resolution Unit tag (0x0128). Defines the measurement unit for XResolution and YResolution.
        Parameters:
        val - the raw value as a Number
        Returns:
        "None", "inches" or "cm"

      • translateCompression

        private static java.lang.String translateCompression(java.lang.Object val)
        Translates the Compression tag (0x0103). Maps TIFF compression scheme identifiers to their technical names.
        Parameters:
        val - the raw value as a Number
        Returns:
        the name of the compression scheme, such as "LZW", "PackBits"

      • translateYCbCr

        private static java.lang.String translateYCbCr(java.lang.Object val)
        Translates the YCbCr Positioning tag (0x0213). Defines the position of chroma components relative to luma samples.
        Parameters:
        val - the raw value as a Number
        Returns:
        "Centered" (default), "Co-sited", or the raw value

      • translatePhotometric

        private static java.lang.String translatePhotometric(java.lang.Object val)
        Translates the Photometric Interpretation tag (0x0106). This tag describes the color space of the image data.
        Parameters:
        val - the raw value as a Number
        Returns:
        the human-readable colour space name, for example: "RGB", "YCbCr"

      • translatePlanarConfig

        private static java.lang.String translatePlanarConfig(java.lang.Object val)
        Translates the PlanarConfiguration tag (0x011C). Indicates if colour components are stored interleaved or in separate planes.
        Parameters:
        val - the raw value as a Number
        Returns:
        either "Chunky" (default), "Planar", or the raw value if unknown.

      • translateExtension

        private static java.lang.String translateExtension(TagIFD_Extension tag,
                                                   java.lang.Object val)

      • translateCleanFax

        private static java.lang.String translateCleanFax(java.lang.Object val)

      • translateIndexed

        private static java.lang.String translateIndexed(java.lang.Object val)
        Translates the Image Indexed tag (0x015A). Defines whether the image should be indexed or not.
        Parameters:
        val - the raw value as a Number
        Returns:
        "Indexed", "Not Indexed", or the raw value

      • translateXPString

        private static java.lang.String translateXPString(java.lang.Object val)
        Decodes Windows-specific XP tags, for example: XPTitle, XPAuthor, XPSubject.

        These tags are unique outliers in the TIFF specification. While standard TIFF strings use ASCII, Microsoft encodes these as UTF-16LE. Furthermore, they are stored as BYTE types rather than ASCII types, which often results in binary-level quirks handled here:

        • Type Casting: Converts int[] back to byte[] using ByteValueConverter.castToByteArray(int[]), reversing the expansion performed by the IFD parser for unsigned bytes.
        • The Dangling Byte: Because UTF-16LE requires 2 bytes per character, an odd-lengthed array (often caused by single-byte padding) is malformed. This method truncates the "dangling" byte to prevent the insertion of replacement characters (?).
        • Null Termination: Unlike standard Java strings, these decoded buffers often contain trailing null characters (\0) followed by random padding data. This method performs a double-cleanup by truncating at the first null and then trimming whitespace.
        Parameters:
        val - the raw tag value (expected as byte[] or int[])
        Returns:
        a sanitised, human-readable string, or String.valueOf(val) if the input is not a byte-based array

      • translatePrivate

        private static java.lang.String translatePrivate(TagIFD_Private tag,
                                                 java.lang.Object val)

      • formatRational

        private static java.lang.String formatRational(java.lang.Object val)
        Formats RationalNumbers and arrays of Rational Numbers (common in GPS data) into a clean, human-readable string format.
        Parameters:
        val - the RationalNumber, RationalNumber[], or other Number types
        Returns:
        a formatted string, such as "72" or "51 30 12.5"

      • formatNumericValue

        private static java.lang.String formatNumericValue(java.lang.Object val)
        Formats floating-point values to a maximum of 4 decimal places, stripping trailing zeros and decimal points to match professional metadata tools like ExifTool.
        Parameters:
        val - the double-precision value to format
        Returns:
        a clean string representation of the number

      • convertToInt

        private static int convertToInt(java.lang.Object val)
        Normalises data embedded in the specified Object type into a primary integer value.
        Parameters:
        val - the raw object value to resolve
        Returns:
        the resolved integer value, or -1 if unsupported

      • convertToDouble

        private static double convertToDouble(java.lang.Object val)
        Extracts a double from various object types (Number, RationalNumber, arrays).
        Parameters:
        val - the raw object value to resolve
        Returns:
        the resolved double value, or Double.NaN if unsupported
